meaning: n.圣人,道德崇高的人,圣徒adj.神圣v.成为圣徒
examples: Every parish was named after a saint.
He reconnoitred the Gulf of Saint Lawrence, travelling up the magnificent river as far as modern Montreal.
I go to the 7th grade in Saint Michael School.
Saint Catherine of Siena (1347 to 1380) is co-patron saint of Italy and one of Europe's patron saints.
They met at Saint Andrews University in 2003 when Middletone was a house-mate of Williams.
